purpose: Analyze declared CORS policy settings and report insecure combinations for web APIs before deployment.

endpoints.description: Analyze CORS settings and return findings for risky combinations.

sidecar_specification.purpose: CORS configuration analyzer for web API risk review.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use before deploying or changing CORS settings for a browser-facing web API.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use to enforce CORS at runtime or replace manual security review for high-risk applications.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Build a CORS policy descriptor. 2) Call /cors/analyze. 3) Review high and warning findings before deployment.

findings.message: Wildcard origin must not be combined with credentials.

failure_modes.recovery: Use valid origins or the literal wildcard when intended

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Implement deterministic checks: wildcard origin plus credentials is high, broad methods with broad headers is warning, null origin is warning, and invalid URL origins are 400 except literal '*'.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: CORS origin values are origins, not full URLs with paths. Credentials change the risk of otherwise common settings.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Create analyzeCorsPolicy(policy) returning risk_level and findings sorted by severity.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not modify server middleware, do not make runtime allow or deny decisions, and do not fetch origins.
